prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit, PySCF backend) in the gas phase. The molecule (9 atoms: 1 oxygen, 4 carbons, 4 hydrogens) was studied at charge 0, multiplicity 1. Fukui indices were calculated via finite-difference of Mulliken partial atomic charges on the neutral, cation (N+1, charge +1, multiplicity 2), and anion (N−1, charge −1, multiplicity 2) species. SCF converged for all three states; charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.000, sum f⁻ = 1.000). The most electrophilic site is the C atom at position 5 with f⁺ = 1.924. The most nucleophilic site is the same C atom with f⁻ = 0.162. The dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻) ranges from −1.415 (oxygen, electrophobic) to +1.763 (C-4 and C-5, electrophilic). A reactivity plot has been generated. Geometry input: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (used as-is). Command: `fukui --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. Integrity: ok and trustworthy. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="value">null
